title: The Island Princess
director: Paolo Moffa, Carlos Serrano de Osma
writer: Juan del Río Ayala, Luis Martínez Carvajal, Paolo Moffa
actors: Silvana Pampanini, Marcello Mastroianni, Gustavo Rojo
plot: 1470. The Canary Islands try to resist the Spanish invaders. Their inhabitants are divided, their chief and his daughter Guayarmina (for whom a Spanish officer has fallen in love) wanting the peace, while the priest and resistance...
